positive: A stunning, detailed celestial emblem featuring a stylized crescent moon interwoven with geometric constellations and ethereal cosmic flora. The design must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for an apparel print. Use a color palette dominated by deep midnight blue, cosmic purple, and striking metallic accents of iridescent gold and deep teal. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with clean, modern linework and strong geometric silhouettes, giving it the look of a luxury engraving or a detailed celestial map. Include subtle, glowing light effects emanating from the moons core and the stars, contrasted against a deep, velvety background. Highly detailed, vector illustration, minimal gradients, badge design, high contrast.
negative: blur, grain, noise, ugly, watermark, signature, text, logo, cropped, border, busy background, low detail, artifact, messy, bad anatomy
